_comment_0: IDs are strings here. The loader converts them to ints. Keys starting with '_' are ignored.

guild._comment: The only guild this bot will operate in.

roles._comment_mod: Roles for moderation/tickets and admin gating.
roles._comment_autodelete: Whitelist roles allowed to message/react in autodelete channel without restriction.
roles._comment_tracking: Members with this role are excluded from activity tracking and weekly ranking.
roles._comment_autoDM: When a member gains watched role, they receive a DM.
roles._comment_gambling: Role granted by rare gambling wins.
roles._comment_rps: Role awarded when a user wins 5 rock-paper-scissors games in a row.

entries.message:
## Wanna partner?
DM an Owner/Admin if you meet these standards
 - Be a positive, active, and SFW community
 - Have a partnership or any other ping format to partner
 - Have more than 100 members (if not you won't get pinged here)
 - Be nice and friendly when asking :)

## Only use this channel if you have creator points!
> Use <@358598636436979713>'s `/profile` command if you have linked your account to the bot so we can give you the role.

> If you haven't linked your GD account to your Discord account, please use `/account link` in https://discord.com/channels/717003826288394271/717004813845659671 and follow the steps.
### If you react or send a random message here, you will be restricted from using this channel FOREVER
Remember to follow our [feedback format](https://discord.com/channels/717003826288394271/1457746418574950441) and to **NOT SKIP OTHERS**. Failure to do so will result in restrictions.

forum_first_message._comment_entries: Optional: multiple forum channels. If present, 'entries' overrides single forum_channel_id/templates. You can also use "{required_word}" for the required word as a variable in the DM message

entries._comment_required_word: Threads in this forum must include required_word in the title/body, or the bot will DM the owner and delete the thread. Change required_word to any word you want.
entries.missing_required_word_dm: Your collab thread "{thread_name}" in {guild} was removed because it did not follow our format. Please repost it using [our format](https://discord.com/channels/717003826288394271/1452027365755453664/1452027365755453664).

entries.message: Hi {user}, you got {role} in {guild}! Please contact staff through my DMs if this was a mistake. If you were muted as a punishment for an infraction, please ignore this.
Hi {user}, you have been marked as {role}, please select 'Contact staff' after DMing me on my selection menu to verify you are not a bot.

Hi {user}, you have received {role}, this will restrict your access to our server feedback. If you think this was a mistake or would like to appeal, please DM me and select 'Appeal punishment' on my menu selection.

Hi {user}, you have received {role}, this will restrict your access to our level requests. If you think this was a mistake or would like to appeal, please DM me and select 'Appeal punishment' on my menu selection or fill out this [form](https://forms.gle/o6YSEfRQt4HW9ozGA).

Hi {user}, you have received {role}, this will restrict your access to our Creator Points role proof channel. If you think this was a mistake or would like to appeal, please DM me and select 'Appeal punishment' on my menu selection.

gambling._comment_win_combo: If rare win triggers, final combo becomes this value.
gambling._comment_display: During spinning, the slot emoji is not shown. Final result is wrapped like: 🎰 🍒🍋🍇 🎰

help._comment: Help system settings for FAQs, appeals, reports, bot issues, weekly status, and transcript requests.

faq._comment: FAQ entries shown in DMs when user selects FAQ.
faq.title: FAQ
entries:
How do I request my level?
> Try to use https://discord.com/channels/717003826288394271/1464023199535857867/1465793845513031680, if it's closed it will let you know.

How do I partner with GD Avenue?
> DM an Mayor/Secretary if your server follows our requirements found in https://discord.com/channels/717003826288394271/731145959043498116.

How do weekly requests work?
> Being active during the week sums up your activity count, the most active members get DMed on Sunday to claim their request each week.

How do I contact Mods/Staff/Admins?
> Use 'Staff contact' to open a private ticket in my selection menu, though only use this if needed.

My level got send/rejected in level requests, what do I do now?
> If your level got rejected, try to take into account the feedback we give you. If it got accepted, we might contact you with more info, but know that your level might be on its way to mods!

Where do I post/search for collabs?
> Use https://discord.com/channels/717003826288394271/1104487618026143754 and follow our guidelines!

Where do I ask for feedback?
> Use https://discord.com/channels/717003826288394271/1480304268346130552 and follow our guidelines!

Do you send levels to mods?
> Yes, though we only send a certain amount of levels, which are determined by how many judges are available per request wave.

Are there any extra resources related to the server?
> Yeah! You can find our **level idea generator**, extended rules, and an about us section on [this web](https://gdavenue.netlify.app/).

help._comment_cooldowns: Help action cooldowns are enforced in code: appeal=48h, report_user=24h, bot_issue=6h, transcript=8h.

level_requests._comment: Main level request wave system. Replace channel/role IDs with real server IDs before use.

level_validation._comment: Checks submitted level IDs through GDBrowser and the direct GD/Boomlings endpoint. Cache keeps repeated submissions fast and refreshes after cache_seconds.

messages.missing: That level ID does not seem to exist. Please check the ID and try again.
messages.showcase_required: This level appears to be a demon or platformer, so a showcase URL is required.

messages.no_requirements: You don't meet the requirements, please read the requesting rules
messages.first_time_prompt:
It seems like it is your first time requesting a level, **bad things will happen if you do not read the following carefully**.
- If the level utilizes an external song, there must be a fitting in-game replacement and you must say it on your request.
- Requesting any level that breaks Geometry Dash's upload guidelines such as controversial or nsfw levels will lead to request restriction or ban depending on the rule broken.
- Submit levels that you think deserve a rate. Don't send previews or layouts (also short length levels no allowed)
- Don't force us to revise, review or send to mods your level.
- Don't get mad if your level hasn't been sent.
- Send the level only 1 time.
- Don't promote your level on any other channel or send it to private messages.
If you plan on breaking any of these rules, please press I Will. If you plan on following and not breaking our rules, please press I Won't.
messages.edit_window_expired: Your request can no longer be edited.
messages.validation_error: Please fix your request before submitting: {errors}
messages.already_submitted: You already submitted a level during this request wave...
messages.duplicate_level: This level has already been requested in this wave
messages.not_configured: The request system is not fully configured yet or is faulty... mb, contact Average.

request_button_embed.title: Level Requests
request_button_embed.description_open: Requests are currently **open**. Press the button below to request your level :D
request_button_embed.description_closed: Requests are currently **closed**. Please wait for the next request wave...
request_button_embed.footer: GD Avenue Level Requests, don't break any rules!

wave_summary_embed.title: Wave {wave_id} Summary
wave_summary_embed.description: Live review progress for this request wave.

fields.name: Not sent breakdown
fields.value:
Rejected: **{rejected_count}**
Level doesn't exist: **{level_doesnt_exist_count}**
Stolen level: **{stolen_level_count}**
Already rated: **{already_rated_count}**

wave_summary_embed.footer: This updates whenever a request in the wave is reviewed.

sent_result_embed.title: Your level was sent!
sent_result_embed.description: {requester_mention}, your level **{level_name}** has been **sent**. Reviewed by {reviewer_mention}.

rejected_result_embed.title: Your level was rejected
rejected_result_embed.description: {requester_mention}, your level **{level_name}** has been **rejected**. Reviewed by {reviewer_mention}.

other_result_embed.title: Your level request could not be accepted
other_result_embed.description: {requester_mention}, your level **{level_name}** has been marked as **{result}**. Reviewed by {reviewer_mention}.

background._comment: Background telemetry and scheduled tasks. Safe to disable completely.

daily_summary._comment: Optional daily summary embed (Madrid time). If channel_id is empty, falls back to general_logging_channel_id.

status_rotation._comment: Optional rotating presence. Each entry is an object: {type,text}. Types: playing, watching, listening, competing.
